title: carissa longiflora
intro: Carissa longiflora, also known as the Cape Honeysuckle, is a flowering evergreen shrub native to South Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which are attributed to its rich content of saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Carissa longiflora include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. Carissa longiflora is traditionally prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and can also be used in tincture or capsule form for its medicinal properties.
